message:
refactor(cli): extract swap_validated_sqlite_artifact, improve doctor token checks

SQLite recovery had duplicated quarantine-and-swap logic across backup
restore, archive reconstruction, and doctor reconstruct paths. This
consolidates it into a single swap_validated_sqlite_artifact() function
with rollback-on-failure semantics and testable injection points.

- Extract swap_validated_sqlite_artifact() and _with() variant for
  deterministic failure injection in tests
- Replace sqlite_quarantine_path() with next_sqlite_quarantine_path()
  that handles collision avoidance without side effects
- Add DoctorMcpConfigBearerStatus enum to distinguish missing vs
  mismatched bearer tokens in HTTP-mode MCP configs
- doctor_mcp_config_bearer_status() now reports missing tokens as
  a separate diagnostic (previously only detected mismatches)
- Flatten nested if-let chains in setup status for clarity
- Add tests for swap rollback on main rename and sidecar move failure
- Add tests for doctor bearer token detection in TOML configs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
